---
title: "Test ggplot new version and RDS"
author: "Kwaku Owusu-Tieku"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    theme: cosmo
engine: knitr
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
```


```{r}
mtcarsPlot <- readRDS("mtcars.RDS")
mtcarsPlot
```

```{r, fig.width=fig_tall(14)$width, fig.height=fig_tall(14)$height}
#| label: occupation-ranking
p_occ <- readRDS("chart_age_density.rds")
p_occ
```
